stdout:
I now have sufficient data for all 23 entries. Compiling the final research report.

## Market Research — Kabukicho Survival Map (task-0014-lodging-price-tiers)

Read-only research per the output contract; no repository files modified. Weekday, single/double standard room or capsule/cabin equivalent rates, cited as found. Love hotels: overnight/宿泊 (stay) rate used, not short-rest — noted explicitly.

### Capsule hotels / net-cafe-capsule hybrids

| Entry | Price found | Source | Tier |
|---|---|---|---|
| ブース ネットカフェ&カプセル | Capsule floor from ¥3,800/night; overnight net-cafe from ¥2,800 | [rocketnews24](https://rocketnews24.com/2024/07/17/2311640/), [yokoso-shinjuku.com](https://yokoso-shinjuku.com/lodging/capsule-hotel/booth-net-cafe-capsule/) | **price_band_budget** |
| 新宿区役所前カプセルホテル | ~¥2,500–3,000/night (from ¥3,000) | [rocketnews24](https://rocketnews24.com/2022/01/18/1591029/), [jalan.net](https://www.jalan.net/yad322352/plan/) | **price_band_budget** |
| カプセルホテル新宿510 | ~¥2,500–3,100/night | [aggregator summary via bestrsv/jtb/agoda listings](https://www.jtb.co.jp/kokunai-hotel/htl/4016A35/plan/), [capsule510.jp official](https://capsule510.jp/) | **price_band_budget** |
| グリーンプラザ新宿 | **Facility closed permanently Dec 24–25, 2016** (site now occupied by Tokyu Kabukicho Tower). Historical rate was ¥2,800–3,522/night. | [onsen.nifty.com (closure notice)](https://onsen.nifty.com/shinjuku-onsen/onsen001442/), [yado-navi.info (historical price)](https://www.yado-navi.info/tokyo/cat_18/ent_2.html) | **N/A — flag for removal, not a price-tier question.** This entry should be deleted/deprecated from the dataset entirely as it no longer exists; do not assign a tier. |
| ELE Cabin 新宿歌舞伎町 | No specific rate found in this pass; capsule-cabin category, 70 rooms | [NAVITIME](https://www.navitime.co.jp/poi?spot=01140-RK187660), [jalan.net](https://www.jalan.net/yad362626/) | **price_band_budget (inferred)** — chain-comparable to other Kabukicho capsule/cabin listings above (all ¥2,500–3,800), no reason to expect it deviates from that band. |
| カプセルホテル トランジット新宿 | No specific rate found; capsule hotel, women's floor, 24h | [yokoso-shinjuku.com](https://yokoso-shinjuku.com/lodging/capsule-hotel/transit/), [mport.info](https://tokyo.mport.info/inn/tokyo/tokyo23/shinjuku/capsule_hotel_transit_shinjuku.html) | **price_band_budget (inferred)** — same reasoning: comparable capsule-hotel peers cluster ¥2,500–3,800. |

### Internet cafés / manga cafés (overnight/night-pack rate)

| Entry | Price found | Source | Tier |
|---|---|---|---|
| 快活CLUB 新宿歌舞伎町店 | Chain-wide locked-room 12h night-pack ranges ¥2,310–6,860 depending on store; Shinjuku-specific rate not isolated in this pass | [note.com analysis](https://note.com/marthay/n/ne10b0208c0c0), [official shop page](https://www.kaikatsu.jp/shop/detail/20931.html) | **price_band_budget (inferred)** — even the high end of the chain-wide range (¥6,860) is under ¥8,000; Kabukicho is a high-demand area so likely near the top of that range, but still budget. |
| グランサイバーカフェ Bagus 新宿(歌舞伎町) | 10-hour night pack confirmed to exist; exact ¥ not surfaced | [official shop page](https://internet-cafe.bagus-99.com/shops/shinjuku/) | **price_band_budget (inferred)** — net-cafe chain-comparable positioning, consistent with 快活CLUB/ゲラゲラ/アプレシオ peers all well under ¥8,000. |
| ゲラゲラ 新宿マンガ喫茶 | Chain pack pricing: 3h ¥750, 8h ¥1,480 (this specific コマ劇場前 branch has since closed per search results — verify which ゲラゲラ branch the dataset entry refers to) | [mura-life.com](https://mura-life.com/netcafe/geragera-shinjuku/), [geragera.co.jp](https://www.geragera.co.jp/store/sjk_koma/fee) | **price_band_budget** — chain pricing is unambiguously budget-tier regardless of exact branch. **Flag: verify branch is still open**, separate from the tier question. |
| アプレシオ 新宿ハイジア店 | Night 8h pack ¥1,500, night 12h pack ¥1,800 (source dated ~2019, likely stale but directionally reliable) | [r.gnavi.co.jp menu](https://r.gnavi.co.jp/a938801/menu5/) | **price_band_budget** |
| グランカスタマ歌舞伎町店 | No specific rate re-confirmed this pass; net-cafe/manga-cafe chain with bath facilities (already tagged price_band_budget per task-0013) | [g-customa.com official](https://g-customa.com/shop/kabuki.php) | **price_band_budget** — consistent with net-cafe category peers above. |

### Business hotel chains (standard room, weekday)

| Entry | Price found | Source | Tier |
|---|---|---|---|
| アパホテル新宿歌舞伎町タワー | 2-adult/room from ¥12,134 (1 person ¥9,721~); JTB range ¥11,300–65,600/room | [Agoda](https://www.agoda.com/ja-jp/apa-hotel-shinjuku-kabukichotower/hotel/tokyo-jp.html) via search summary, [JTB](https://www.jtb.co.jp/kokunai-hotel/htl/4016A99/plan/) | **price_band_mid** |
| アパホテル新宿歌舞伎町中央 | From ¥13,273 (Agoda); 2-adult from ¥10,640 (jalan) | [Agoda](https://www.agoda.com/ja-jp/apa-hotel-shinjuku-kabukicho-chuo/hotel/tokyo-jp.html), [jalan.net](https://www.jalan.net/yad362748/) | **price_band_mid** |
| 東横イン東京新宿歌舞伎町 | From ¥7,544 (Agoda); reported weekday examples ~¥10,000 | [Agoda](https://www.agoda.com/ja-jp/toyoko-inn-tokyo-shinjuku-kabuki-cho/hotel/tokyo-jp.html) | **price_band_mid** — low end (¥7,544) sits just under the ¥8,000 budget/mid line, but Toyoko Inn is unambiguously a standard business-hotel chain, not a capsule/net-cafe; treat as mid per the tier's stated intent (business hotel chains → mid), consistent with its APA peers. |
| スーパーホテル新宿歌舞伎町 | 2-adult from ¥11,300; single-date example ¥14,300 | [jalan.net](https://www.jalan.net/yad396148/), search summary | **price_band_mid** |

### Love hotels (宿泊/stay rate used, not 休憩/rest rate)

| Entry | Rest rate (not used for tier) | **Stay/宿泊 rate (used for tier)** | Source | Tier |
|---|---|---|---|
| ホテル モアナ新宿(アダルト専用) | Short-time from ¥3,700 (2h) | No 宿泊-specific rate isolated; one aggregator listing showed ¥16,910/night, but that figure's date/plan context is unclear | [happyhotel.jp](https://happyhotel.jp/hotels/543460), [official system page](https://www.hoteltemoanashinjuku.com/system) | **price_band_mid (chain-comparable inference)** — flagged as *not backed by a confirmed current stay-rate citation*; the one ¥16,910 figure found is unverified/single-source, so I default to mid (consistent with peer love hotels PASHA/ATLAS/Perrier/Balian, all ¥10,800–17,800 stay) rather than promote to high on a single unconfirmed data point. |
| HOTEL & SPA J-MEX 新宿歌舞伎町(アダルト専用) | Not queried directly | **¥10,300–15,800 across room types (宿泊)** | [jht-j-mex.jp official price page](https://jht-j-mex.jp/price/) | **price_band_mid** |
| HOTEL Perrier(アダルト専用) | ¥5,900~ (休憩) | **¥10,800~ (宿泊), room-type example ¥14,200~** | [jht-perrier.jp official price page](https://jht-perrier.jp/price/) | **price_band_mid** |
| ホテルバリアンリゾート新宿本店 | Not queried directly | **¥14,800~ (宿泊, 2 guests)** | [balian.jp official](https://www.balian.jp/shop/shinjuku/room/) | **price_band_mid** |
| HOTEL PASHA | ¥7,300~ (休憩) | **¥13,400~ (宿泊)** | [search summary citing hotenavi/official](https://www.hotenavi.com/jht06/room) | **price_band_mid** |
| HOTEL ATLAS | ¥7,450~ (休憩, weekday) | **¥14,450 (Sun–Thu/holiday), ¥16,800 (Fri/pre-holiday), ¥17,800 (Sat) (宿泊)** | [hotel-atlas.jp official](https://hotel-atlas.jp/), search summary | **price_band_mid** — even the Saturday peak (¥17,800) stays under the ¥20,000 high-tier threshold. |

**Love-hotel pattern confirmed:** every love hotel entry researched (Perrier, Balian, PASHA, ATLAS, J-MEX) has a real, sourced overnight/宿泊 rate in the ¥10,300–17,800 band — solidly price_band_mid, matching the task's stated expectation ("most love hotels" → mid). モアナ is the one exception where I could not pin down a reliable current stay rate; tiered as mid by chain-comparable inference, flagged below.

### Full-service / internationally branded hotels

| Entry | Price found | Source | Tier |
|---|---|---|---|
| ホテルグレイスリー新宿 (Godzilla Hotel) | 2-adult/room aggregate range ¥19,398–76,492 (i.e. ~¥9,700–38,000/person); Tokyo lodging-tax bracket references imply a large share of stays fall in the ≥¥10,000 and ≥¥15,000 brackets | [aggregator summary](https://travel.kakaku.com/), Tokyo accommodation tax public schedule referenced on [gracery.com](https://gracery.com/shinjuku/) | **price_band_high** — 970-room full-service hotel; even the low end of the 2-adult/room range (¥19,398, i.e. ~¥9,700/person) reflects a fundamentally different product tier than budget business-hotel chains, and typical single/double rates commonly clear ¥20,000+ per room. This is the clearest case in the batch for correcting the original mid-tag: a landmark full-service hotel should not sit identically with 東横イン. |
| HOTEL GROOVE SHINJUKU, A PARKROYAL Hotel | From $176–289/night (≈¥26,000–43,000 at typical FX); example Garden Suite King w/ breakfast ¥79,874 | [KAYAK](https://www.kayak.com/Tokyo-Hotels-Hotel-Groove-Shinjuku-A-Parkroyal-Hotel.1070681561.ksp), [ikyu.com](https://www.ikyu.com/en-us/00002999/11407993/10225140/) | **price_band_high** — international upscale brand (PARKROYAL/Pan Pacific), rates start well above ¥20,000 even for entry-level rooms. |

### Assumptions
- FX conversion for HOTEL GROOVE USD quotes assumed ~¥148–150/USD (current 2026 range); even at a conservative ¥130/USD the low end (~$176) still clears ¥20,000.
- For entries without a directly isolated numeric rate (ELE Cabin, Transit Shinjuku, Bagus, グランカスタマ, 快活CLUB Shinjuku-Kabukicho-specific figure, モアナ宿泊), I inferred tier from confirmed category peers within the same dataset/search batch, per the task's explicit instruction to do so rather than leave unresolved.
- グリーンプラザ新宿's closure (2016, replaced by Tokyu Kabukicho Tower) is a factual finding independent of price-tier research; I did not invent a tier for a non-existent venue.

### Hypotheses
- H1: 東横イン's ¥7,544 low-end quote is likely a rare loss-leader/off-peak rate; typical weekday rates cluster closer to ¥10,000+ per the review-cited example, supporting mid over budget despite the single low outlier.
- H2: ゲラゲラ's コマ劇場前 branch closure suggests the dataset's "ゲラゲラ 新宿マンガ喫茶" entry may reference a now-defunct location — worth a follow-up existence check (separate from this price-tier task), similar to the グリーンプラザ finding.

### Recommendations
1. Correctly split the two most obviously mistagged entries: **ホテルグレイスリー新宿 → price_band_high**, **HOTEL GROOVE SHINJUKU, A PARKROYAL Hotel → price_band_high**. Both currently sit at price_band_mid identically to 東横イン; this was the core problem statement and is now backed by cited rate evidence.
2. Assign **price_band_budget** to: ブース ネットカフェ&カプセル, 新宿区役所前カプセルホテル, カプセルホテル新宿510, ELE Cabin新宿歌舞伎町(inferred), 快活CLUB新宿歌舞伎町店, グランサイバーカフェBagus新宿(inferred), ゲラゲラ新宿マンガ喫茶(pending branch-status check), アプレシオ新宿ハイジア店, カプセルホテルトランジット新宿(inferred), グランカスタマ歌舞伎町店.
3. Assign **price_band_mid** to: アパホテル新宿歌舞伎町タワー, アパホテル新宿歌舞伎町中央, 東横イン東京新宿歌舞伎町, スーパーホテル新宿歌舞伎町, ホテルモアナ新宿(inferred, flagged), HOTEL&SPA J-MEX, HOTEL Perrier, ホテルバリアンリゾート新宿本店, HOTEL PASHA, HOTEL ATLAS.
4. **Remove or explicitly mark グリーンプラザ新宿 as permanently closed** rather than assigning it any price tier — it ceased operating in Dec 2016 and the site is now Tokyu Kabukicho Tower. This is a data-integrity issue independent of the pricing task and should be raised as its own fix.
5. **Verify current operating status of the ゲラゲラ entry** — the specific branch referenced in the closest-matching search result has closed; confirm which ゲラゲラ location the dataset entry actually points to before finalizing its tier (tier itself is unambiguously budget regardless of branch, but existence should be re-checked).
6. Follow-up geocoding/pricing note carried over from task-0013: none of this task's tier assignments required new lat/lng, so no additional caveat there — this task only touches the `tags` field.

Sources: [rocketnews24 Booth](https://rocketnews24.com/2024/07/17/2311640/), [yokoso-shinjuku.com Booth](https://yokoso-shinjuku.com/lodging/capsule-hotel/booth-net-cafe-capsule/), [rocketnews24 区役所前](https://rocketnews24.com/2022/01/18/1591029/), [jalan.net 区役所前](https://www.jalan.net/yad322352/plan/), [JTB 510](https://www.jtb.co.jp/kokunai-hotel/htl/4016A35/plan/), [capsule510.jp official](https://capsule510.jp/), [onsen.nifty.com グリーンプラザ closure](https://onsen.nifty.com/shinjuku-onsen/onsen001442/), [yado-navi.info グリーンプラザ historical](https://www.yado-navi.info/tokyo/cat_18/ent_2.html), [NAVITIME ELE Cabin](https://www.navitime.co.jp/poi?spot=01140-RK187660), [yokoso-shinjuku.com
